'>' : '<'; }} if ({{# def.$dataNotType:'number' }} Object.keys({{=$data}}).length {{=$op}} {{=$schemaValue}}) { {{ var $errorKeyword = $keyword; }} {{# def.error:'_limitProperties' }} } {{? $breakOnError }} else { {{?}}
